prompt_text: Open source or affordable HR tools instead of BambooHR
response:
# Affordable HR Tools & Alternatives to BambooHR

## Open Source Options

**Odoo HR Module**
- Free (open source) or cloud paid plans
- Covers recruitment, payroll, leave management, employee data
- Requires some technical setup but highly customizable

**ERPNext**
- Free & open source
- HR, payroll, attendance, performance management
- Good for growing companies; self-hosted option available

**OpenHRMS**
- Completely free, open source
- Employee records, leave, recruitment, shifts
- Lighter weight, easier to deploy

## Low-Cost SaaS Alternatives

**Guidepoint/Zoho People** ($1-3/user/month)
- Mobile-friendly, HRIS features
- Zoho ecosystem integration

**Workday Community Edition**
- Free for nonprofits and educational institutions
- Full Workday features (normally expensive)

**BrightHire**
- Budget-friendly recruiting + onboarding
- ~$2-5/user/month range

**HiBob** (mid-market but scalable)
- ~$8/user/month (cheaper at scale)
- Modern interface, good UX

## Lightweight/Specialized Tools
- **Toggles** - attendance/leave only (~$1-2/user)
- **Justworks** - all-in-one for small business
- **Rippling** - device management included

## Considerations
- **Company size matters** (under 50 vs. 500+)
- **Must-haves?** (payroll, compliance, benefits?)
- **Budget** for implementation/training

What's your company size & primary needs?
